languages.text: "Странная пелена окутала меня, и шепот Неумирающего едва слышен... В этом краю я полагаюсь лишь на твои указания, Домин".

traits.locale_text: "Странная пелена окутала меня, и шепот Неумирающего едва слышен... В этом краю я полагаюсь лишь на твои указания, Домин".
traits.speaker: KibellahCompanion

languages.text: "A strange haze has enveloped me, and even the Undying One's whispers are hard to make out. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."
languages.original_text: "Странная пелена окутала меня, и шепот Неумирающего едва слышен... В этом краю я полагаюсь лишь на твои указания, Домин".

traits.locale_text: "A strange haze has enveloped me, and the Undying's whispers are barely audible. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."
"A strange haze has enveloped me, and the Undying's whispers are barely audible. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."
"A strange haze has enveloped me, and even the Undying One's whispers are hard to make out. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."
"A strange haze has enveloped me, and even the Undying One's whispers are hard to make out. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."
"A strange haze has enveloped me, and even the Undying One's whispers are hard to make out. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."

languages.text: «Me envuelve una extraña neblina y hasta los susurros del Inmortal son difíciles de distinguir. En esta tierra dependeré solo de su guía, Domin».
languages.original_text: "A strange haze has enveloped me, and even the Undying One's whispers are hard to make out. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."

traits.locale_text: «Me envuelve una extraña neblina y hasta los susurros del Inmortal son difíciles de distinguir. En esta tierra dependeré solo de su guía, Domin».

languages.text: “一股奇异的迷雾笼罩了我，就连不死之神的低语都难以分辨。在这片土地上，我只能全然仰赖您的指引，秘者。”
languages.original_text: "A strange haze has enveloped me, and even the Undying One's whispers are hard to make out. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."

traits.locale_text: “一股奇异的迷雾笼罩了我，就连不死之神的低语都难以分辨。在这片土地上，我只能全然仰赖您的指引，秘者。”

languages.text: « Une étrange brume m'enveloppe, et je peine même à discerner les murmures de l'Immortel. En ces lieux, je ne peux m'en remettre qu'à vous, Domin. »
languages.original_text: "A strange haze has enveloped me, and even the Undying One's whispers are hard to make out. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."

traits.locale_text: « Une étrange brume m'enveloppe, et je peine même à discerner les murmures de l'Immortel. En ces lieux, je ne peux m'en remettre qu'à vous, Domin. »

languages.text: "Beni tuhaf bir sis sardı ve Ölmeyen'in fısıltılarını bile duymak zorlaştı. Bu topraklarda sadece senin rehberliğine güvenebilirim Domin."
languages.original_text: "A strange haze has enveloped me, and even the Undying One's whispers are hard to make out. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."

traits.locale_text: "Beni tuhaf bir sis sardı ve Ölmeyen'in fısıltılarını bile duymak zorlaştı. Bu topraklarda sadece senin rehberliğine güvenebilirim Domin."

languages.text: "Ein seltsamer Nebel hat mich umhüllt, und selbst das Flüstern des Todlosen ist kaum noch zu hören. In diesem Land muss ich mich allein auf Eure Führung verlassen, Domin."
languages.original_text: "A strange haze has enveloped me, and even the Undying One's whispers are hard to make out. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."

traits.locale_text: "Ein seltsamer Nebel hat mich umhüllt, und selbst das Flüstern des Todlosen ist kaum noch zu hören. In diesem Land muss ich mich allein auf Eure Führung verlassen, Domin."

languages.text: 「奇妙な霧が私を包み、不死の者のささやきさえ聞き取れない。この地では、君の導き頼みにするしかない、ドミナス。」
languages.original_text: "A strange haze has enveloped me, and even the Undying One's whispers are hard to make out. In this land, I must rely solely upon your guidance, Domin."

traits.locale_text: 「奇妙な霧が私を包み、不死の者のささやきさえ聞き取れない。この地では、君の導き頼みにするしかない、ドミナス。」
